---
title: Les quais Paris
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784794106/lesquaisparis_aun6pe.png
description: Les quais Paris
categories: ["urbansketching"]
date: 2023/05/13
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784794106/lesquaisparis_aun6pe.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}

:::
